title: Apple Fiscal Q1 2026 Earnings Highlights
text: Apple reported record fiscal first-quarter results for the period ended December 27, 2025. Quarterly revenue was $143.8 billion, up 16% year over year, and diluted earnings per share were $2.84, up 19% year over year. The quarter was supported by record total company revenue and record earnings per share. Apple said iPhone revenue reached an all-time high, helped by strong customer demand, and Services revenue also reached an all-time high with 14% year-over-year growth. Management highlighted that Apple's installed base exceeded 2.5 billion active devices, which supports future services and ecosystem revenue. Apple generated nearly $54 billion in operating cash flow and returned almost $32 billion to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases. These results show strong product demand, services momentum, and continued shareholder returns.
